creator: engp7743@leonis.nus.sg
text:
X Windows cannot start or start not properly.
First, after configuring XF86Config, I can start X Windows. But the 
resolution is wrong(too low). only a small part of the window can be 
seen.
And then, I modified the XF86Configa and tryied all kinds of possible 
configurations of Video card. And X Windows cannot start any more.

I use HP Vectra PC with Pentium II processor and Matrox Millennum video 
card  and HP Ergo 1024 monitor(15').

How-To-Repeat: Use Matrox Millennum video card, and do configuration.

X Windows cannot start or start not properly..
